arts.ttl: Who is Matai Akinmboni? Bournemouth sign talented center-back from D.C. United
arts.sum: D.C. United have sold highly talented center-back Matai Akinmboni to Bournemouth. According to the Washington Post, the Major League Soccer club will receive an initial €1.5m plus add-ons that...

Akinmboni became the third-youngest player to play in Major League Soccer, with former DC United head coach Wayne Rooney handing him his first senior appearance on 10 September 2022 when he was just 15 years and 328 days old. Akinmboni is the nephew of Bayern Munich great and Ghanaian international Samuel Kuffour, who faced Manchester United in the dramatic 1999 UEFA Champions League final and was named BBC African Footballer of the Year in 2001.
